title: TMC Crisis: Saayoni Ghosh, Yusuf Pathan, Satabdi Roy among 19 MPs in dissent note letter to Speaker
description: The rebellion within the TMC is expected to intensify with a group of around 20 dissident MPs expected to submit a letter to the Lok Sabha Speaker today. The list of breakaway MPs include senior leaders Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar, Yusuf Pathan and Saayoni Ghosh, among others.
